name: Model
summary: The Model class represents a single model open in Tekla Structures. Before interaction with the model, the user will have to create one instance of this class.

constructors.name: Model
constructors.summary: Creates a "handle" to the currently open model.

methods.name: CommitChanges.
methods.summary: Commits the changes made to the model database so far. One commit is something that a user can later on undo with the undo command. A commit also launches the drawing of the changed product model to the visible views. A dependent plug-in should never call CommitChanges, since this would make undo very difficult for the user to do. However, non-dependent plug-ins require a separate commit if new objects are created.

methods.name: CommitChanges(String)
methods.summary: Commits the changes made to the model database so far. One commit is something that a user can later on undo with the undo command. A commit also launches the drawing of the changed product model to the visible views. A plug-in should never call CommitChanges, since this would make undo very difficult for the user to do.

methods.name: FetchModelObjects(List.String., Boolean)
methods.summary: Fetches a list of modelobjects based on given guid list of objects, checks if guid is native or external (for reference model object) and optionally selects objects before returning them.

methods.name: FetchModelObjects(List.Identifier., Boolean)
methods.summary: Fetches a list of modelobjects based on given identifier list of objects, and optionally selects objects before returning them.

methods.name: GetClashCheckHandler
methods.summary: Returns a new clash check handler.

methods.name: GetConnectionStatus
methods.summary: Returns true if a proper connection to the Tekla Structures process has been established. Currently, there's no way to re-establish the connection.

methods.name: GetGUIDByIdentifier
methods.summary: Returns the GUID of the given identifier instance.

methods.name: GetIdentifierByGUID
methods.summary: Returns an identifier instance that has the given GUID in the model.

methods.name: GetInfo
methods.summary: Returns information about the currently open model.

methods.name: GetModelObjectSelector
methods.summary: Returns a ModelObjectSelector instance from which different kind of selections can be made.

methods.name: GetPhases
methods.summary: Returns information about the current model's phases.

methods.name: GetProjectInfo
methods.summary: Returns information about the current model's project.

methods.name: GetReportPropertyDouble
methods.summary: Get a list of property values, where the property is of type double, for the given identifiers.

methods.name: GetReportPropertyInt
methods.summary: Get a list of property values, where the property is of type interger, for the given identifiers.

methods.name: GetReportPropertyStr
methods.summary: Get a list of property values, where the property is of type string, for the given identifiers.

methods.name: GetWorkPlaneHandler
methods.summary: Returns a new work plane handler for the model. The work plane handler can be used to manipulate the current work plane in the model.

methods.name: SelectModelObject
methods.summary: Takes as input an identifier to an object and then checks its type and instantiates and selects it before returning it.
